mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT contractId FROM ( -- 危险废物结算：从 CONTRACT 表查询（必须有PAYABLE类型的结算单） SELECT DISTINCT c.合同编号 AS contractId FROM CONTRACT c INNER JOIN SETTLEMENT st ON st.合同号 = c.合同号 AND st.结算类型 = 'PAYABLE' WHERE 1=1
AND c.合同号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractNo}, '%')
AND c.乙方名称 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partyBName}, '%')
AND c.签订时间 >= STR_TO_DATE(#{dateStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND c.签订时间 <= STR_TO_DATE(#{dateEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
UNION ALL -- 业务费结算：从 BUSINESS_CONTRACT 表查询（必须有PAYABLE类型的结算单） SELECT DISTINCT bc.合同编号 AS contractId FROM BUSINESS_CONTRACT bc INNER JOIN SETTLEMENT st ON st.合同号 = bc.合同单号 AND st.结算类型 = 'PAYABLE' WHERE 1=1
AND bc.合同单号 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractNo}, '%')
AND bc.乙方名称 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partyBName}, '%')
AND bc.签订时间 >= STR_TO_DATE(#{dateStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND bc.签订时间 <= STR_TO_DATE(#{dateEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
) AS combined ORDER BY contractId ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT c.合同编号 AS contractId, c.合同号 AS contractNo, c.乙方名称 AS partyBName, c.合同金额 AS contractAmount, COALESCE(ec.员工姓名, c.创建人编码) AS contractCreatedBy, c.签订时间 AS contractSignDate, '危险废物结算' AS settlementType,
st.结算单编号 AS settlementId, st.结算单单号 AS settlementCode, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(st.结算周期起, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 至 ', DATE_FORMAT(st.结算周期止, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS settlementPeriod, st.结算金额 AS settlementAmount, COALESCE(st.已收金额, 0) AS settlementPaidAmount, COALESCE(es.员工姓名, st.制单人编码) AS settlementCreatedBy,
inv.发票编号 AS invoiceId, inv.发票号码 AS invoiceNumber, inv.开票日期 AS invoiceDate, inv.金额 AS invoiceAmount, inv.税额 AS taxAmount, (inv.金额 + COALESCE(inv.税额, 0)) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(ei.员工姓名, inv.创建人编码) AS invoiceCreatedBy,
rel.关系编号 AS apDetailId, rel.关联金额 AS relatedAmount, rel.关联时间 AS relatedTime, COALESCE(ear.员工姓名, rel.创建人编码) AS apCreatedBy FROM CONTRACT c LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE ec ON ec.员工编码 = c.创建人编码 LEFT JOIN SETTLEMENT st ON st.合同号 = c.合同号 AND st.结算类型 = 'PAYABLE' LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE es ON es.员工编码 = st.制单人编码 LEFT JOIN SETTLEMENT_INVOICE_REL rel ON rel.结算单编号 = st.结算单编号 AND rel.status != 'CANCELLED' LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE ear ON ear.员工编码 = rel.创建人编码 LEFT JOIN INVOICE inv ON inv.发票编号 = rel.发票编号 LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE ei ON ei.员工编码 = inv.创建人编码 WHERE c.合同编号 IN
#{id}
ORDER BY c.合同编号 ASC, st.结算单编号 ASC, inv.发票编号 ASC
